1→// Migration: Candidate Profiles Module
     2→// Adds tables for full candidate profiles, skills, assessments, and job matching
     3→
     4→module.exports = {
     5→  name: '004_candidate_profiles',
     6→  up: async (client) => {
     7→    // Candidate profiles - extended user info
     8→    await client.query(`
     9→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS candidate_profiles (
    10→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    11→        user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE UNIQUE,
    12→        headline VARCHAR(200),
    13→        bio TEXT,
    14→        location VARCHAR(255),
    15→        phone VARCHAR(50),
    16→        linkedin_url VARCHAR(500),
    17→        github_url VARCHAR(500),
    18→        portfolio_url VARCHAR(500),
    19→        resume_url VARCHAR(500),
    20→        photo_url VARCHAR(500),
    21→        availability VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'immediately',
    22→        salary_min INTEGER,
    23→        salary_max INTEGER,
    24→        preferred_job_types JSONB DEFAULT '["full-time"]',
    25→        preferred_locations JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    26→        remote_preference VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'hybrid',
    27→        years_experience INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    28→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    29→        updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    30→      )
    31→    `);
    32→
    33→    // Work experience entries
    34→    await client.query(`
    35→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS work_experience (
    36→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    37→        user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    38→        company_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    39→        title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    40→        location VARCHAR(255),
    41→        start_date DATE,
    42→        end_date DATE,
    43→        is_current BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
    44→        description TEXT,
    45→        achievements JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    46→        skills_used JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    47→        order_index INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    48→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    49→      )
    50→    `);
    51→
    52→    // Education entries
    53→    await client.query(`
    54→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS education (
    55→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    56→        user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    57→        institution VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    58→        degree VARCHAR(255),
    59→        field_of_study VARCHAR(255),
    60→        start_date DATE,
    61→        end_date DATE,
    62→        is_current BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
    63→        gpa DECIMAL(3,2),
    64→        achievements JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    65→        order_index INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    66→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    67→      )
    68→    `);
    69→
    70→    // Skills with categories and levels
    71→    await client.query(`
    72→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS candidate_skills (
    73→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    74→        user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    75→        skill_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    76→        category VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'technical',
    77→        level INTEGER DEFAULT 1 CHECK (level >= 1 AND level <= 5),
    78→        years_experience DECIMAL(3,1) DEFAULT 0,
    79→        is_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
    80→        verified_at TIMESTAMP,
    81→        verified_score INTEGER,
    82→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    83→        UNIQUE(user_id, skill_name)
    84→      )
    85→    `);
    86→
    87→    // Skill assessments
    88→    await client.query(`
    89→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS skill_assessments (
    90→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    91→        user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    92→        skill_id INTEGER REFERENCES candidate_skills(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    93→        assessment_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    94→        title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    95→        questions JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    96→        responses JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    97→        score INTEGER,
    98→        max_score INTEGER DEFAULT 100,
    99→        passed BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
   100→        ai_feedback JSONB,
   101→        duration_seconds INTEGER,
   102→        started_at TIMESTAMP,
   103→        completed_at TIMESTAMP,
   104→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
   105→      )
   106→    `);
   107→
   108→    // Portfolio projects
   109→    await client.query(`
   110→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS portfolio_projects (
   111→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   112→        user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   113→        title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
   114→        description TEXT,
   115→        project_url VARCHAR(500),
   116→        github_url VARCHAR(500),
   117→        image_url VARCHAR(500),
   118→        technologies JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
   119→        role VARCHAR(100),
   120→        start_date DATE,
   121→        end_date DATE,
   122→        highlights JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
   123→        order_index INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
   124→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
   125→      )
   126→    `);
   127→
   128→    // Saved jobs for candidates
   129→    await client.query(`
   130→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS saved_jobs (
   131→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   132→        user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   133→        job_id INTEGER REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   134→        saved_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
   135→        notes TEXT,
   136→        UNIQUE(user_id, job_id)
   137→      )
   138→    `);
   139→
   140→    // Job applications - table already created in migration 002 with candidate_id
   141→    // Add match_score column if not exists
   142→    await client.query(`
   143→      ALTER TABLE job_applications
   144→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS match_score INTEGER
   145→    `);
   146→
   147→    // Parsed resume data (from AI parsing)
   148→    await client.query(`
   149→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS parsed_resumes (
   150→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   151→        user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   152→        original_filename VARCHAR(255),
   153→        file_url VARCHAR(500),
   154→        parsed_data JSONB,
   155→        parsing_status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'pending',
   156→        parsed_at TIMESTAMP,
   157→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
   158→      )
   159→    `);
   160→
   161→    // Create indexes for performance
   162→    await client.query(`CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_candidate_skills_user ON candidate_skills(user_id)`);
   163→    await client.query(`CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_work_experience_user ON work_experience(user_id)`);
   164→    await client.query(`CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_education_user ON education(user_id)`);
   165→    await client.query(`CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_saved_jobs_user ON saved_jobs(user_id)`);
   166→    // Note: job_applications index already exists from migration 002 (idx_job_applications_candidate)
   167→    await client.query(`CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_job_applications_job ON job_applications(job_id)`);
   168→
   169→    console.log('Candidate profiles tables created');
   170→  }
   171→};
   172→

1→module.exports = {
     2→  name: '024_offer_letter_generation',
     3→  async up(client) {
     4→    // Add offer letter content columns
     5→    await client.query(`
     6→      ALTER TABLE offers
     7→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS offer_letter_html TEXT,
     8→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS offer_letter_generated_at TIMESTAMP,
     9→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reporting_to VARCHAR(255),
    10→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS location VARCHAR(255),
    11→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS employment_type VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'full-time',
    12→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS candidate_signature TEXT,
    13→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS candidate_signed_at TIMESTAMP,
    14→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS candidate_sign_ip VARCHAR(100)
    15→    `);
    16→
    17→    console.log('Added offer letter generation columns to offers table');
    18→  }
    19→};
    20→

1→module.exports = {
     2→  name: '015_add_company_id_to_offers',
     3→  async up(client) {
     4→    // Add company_id column to offers table
     5→    await client.query(`
     6→      ALTER TABLE offers
     7→      ADD COLUMN company_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
     8→    `);
     9→
    10→    // Backfill company_id from job.company_id for existing offers
    11→    await client.query(`
    12→      UPDATE offers o
    13→      SET company_id = j.company_id
    14→      FROM jobs j
    15→      WHERE o.job_id = j.id AND o.company_id IS NULL
    16→    `);
    17→
    18→    // Create index for performance
    19→    await client.query(`
    20→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_offers_company ON offers(company_id)
    21→    `);
    22→
    23→    console.log('Added company_id to offers table and backfilled data');
    24→  }
    25→};
    26→

1→// Migration 041: AI Interview Scheduling, Screening Pipeline, Multi-Evaluator tables
     2→module.exports = {
     3→  up: async (client) => {
     4→    // Screening interview templates (recruiter creates per job)
     5→    await client.query(`
     6→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS screening_templates (
     7→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
     8→        company_id INTEGER REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
     9→        job_id INTEGER REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    10→        created_by INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    11→        title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    12→        description TEXT,
    13→        questions JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
    14→        time_limit_minutes INTEGER DEFAULT 45,
    15→        auto_send_on_apply BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
    16→        status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'active',
    17→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    18→        updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    19→      )
    20→    `);
    21→
    22→    // AI Screening sessions (candidate completes async)
    23→    await client.query(`
    24→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS screening_sessions (
    25→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    26→        template_id INTEGER REFERENCES screening_templates(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    27→        company_id INTEGER REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    28→        job_id INTEGER REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    29→        candidate_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    30→        application_id INTEGER REFERENCES job_applications(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    31→        invited_by INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    32→        invite_token VARCHAR(128) UNIQUE,
    33→        questions JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
    34→        responses JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    35→        conversation JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    36→        ai_report JSONB,
    37→        overall_score NUMERIC(5,2),
    38→        status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'invited',
    39→        invited_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    40→        started_at TIMESTAMP,
    41→        completed_at TIMESTAMP,
    42→        expires_at TIMESTAMP,
    43→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    44→      )
    45→    `);
    46→
    47→    // Multi-evaluator AI scores per interview/screening
    48→    await client.query(`
    49→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS interview_evaluations (
    50→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    51→        interview_id INTEGER,
    52→        screening_session_id INTEGER,
    53→        candidate_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    54→        job_id INTEGER REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    55→        company_id INTEGER REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    56→        evaluator_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    57→        score NUMERIC(5,2) NOT NULL,
    58→        max_score NUMERIC(5,2) DEFAULT 100,
    59→        breakdown JSONB,
    60→        reasoning TEXT,
    61→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    62→      )
    63→    `);
    64→
    65→    // Composite evaluation (synthesis of all evaluators)
    66→    await client.query(`
    67→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS interview_composite_scores (
    68→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    69→        interview_id INTEGER,
    70→        screening_session_id INTEGER,
    71→        candidate_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    72→        job_id INTEGER REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    73→        company_id INTEGER REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    74→        technical_score NUMERIC(5,2),
    75→        culture_score NUMERIC(5,2),
    76→        experience_score NUMERIC(5,2),
    77→        composite_score NUMERIC(5,2),
    78→        recommendation VARCHAR(50),
    79→        recommendation_reasoning TEXT,
    80→        recruiter_score NUMERIC(5,2),
    81→        calibration_delta NUMERIC(5,2),
    82→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    83→      )
    84→    `);
    85→
    86→    // Smart scheduling: recruiter availability patterns
    87→    await client.query(`
    88→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scheduling_preferences (
    89→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    90→        user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE UNIQUE,
    91→        timezone VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'America/New_York',
    92→        available_days JSONB DEFAULT '["monday","tuesday","wednesday","thursday","friday"]',
    93→        available_hours JSONB DEFAULT '{"start": "09:00", "end": "17:00"}',
    94→        buffer_minutes INTEGER DEFAULT 15,
    95→        preferred_duration INTEGER DEFAULT 60,
    96→        blackout_dates JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    97→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    98→        updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    99→      )
   100→    `);
   101→
   102→    // Interview reminders
   103→    await client.query(`
   104→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS interview_reminders (
   105→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   106→        interview_id INTEGER REFERENCES scheduled_interviews(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   107→        recipient_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   108→        reminder_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
   109→        send_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
   110→        sent BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
   111→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
   112→      )
   113→    `);
   114→
   115→    // Add screening_status to job_applications if not exists
   116→    await client.query(`
   117→      ALTER TABLE job_applications ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS screening_status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL
   118→    `);
   119→    await client.query(`
   120→      ALTER TABLE job_applications ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS screening_score NUMERIC(5,2) DEFAULT NULL
   121→    `);
   122→
   123→    // Add ai_evaluation to scheduled_interviews
   124→    await client.query(`
   125→      ALTER TABLE scheduled_interviews ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ai_evaluation JSONB DEFAULT NULL
   126→    `);
   127→    await client.query(`
   128→      ALTER TABLE scheduled_interviews ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ai_composite_score NUMERIC(5,2) DEFAULT NULL
   129→    `);
   130→
   131→    // Indexes
   132→    await client.query(`
   133→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_screening_templates_job ON screening_templates(job_id);
   134→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_screening_sessions_candidate ON screening_sessions(candidate_id);
   135→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_screening_sessions_job ON screening_sessions(job_id);
   136→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_screening_sessions_status ON screening_sessions(status);
   137→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_screening_sessions_token ON screening_sessions(invite_token);
   138→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_interview_evaluations_candidate ON interview_evaluations(candidate_id);
   139→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_interview_evaluations_screening ON interview_evaluations(screening_session_id);
   140→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_interview_composite_candidate ON interview_composite_scores(candidate_id);
   141→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_scheduling_prefs_user ON scheduling_preferences(user_id);
   142→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_interview_reminders_send ON interview_reminders(send_at) WHERE sent = false;
   143→    `);
   144→
   145→    console.log('Migration 041: Interview scheduling, screening & evaluation tables created');
   146→  }
   147→};
   148→

1→// TrustScore Migration - Employer Credit Score System
     2→module.exports = {
     3→  name: 'add_trustscore_tables',
     4→  up: async (client) => {
     5→    // Companies table - extended company profiles
     6→    await client.query(`
     7→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS companies (
     8→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
     9→        owner_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    10→        name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    11→        slug VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
    12→        email_domain VARCHAR(255),
    13→        logo_url TEXT,
    14→        website TEXT,
    15→        description TEXT,
    16→        industry VARCHAR(100),
    17→        company_size VARCHAR(50),
    18→        founded_year INTEGER,
    19→        headquarters VARCHAR(255),
    20→        linkedin_url TEXT,
    21→        is_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
    22→        verified_at TIMESTAMP,
    23→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    24→        updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    25→      )
    26→    `);
    27→
    28→    // TrustScore main table - employer credibility score (0-1000)
    29→    await client.query(`
    30→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trust_scores (
    31→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    32→        company_id INTEGER REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE UNIQUE,
    33→        total_score INTEGER DEFAULT 500,
    34→        verification_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    35→        job_authenticity_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    36→        hiring_ratio_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    37→        feedback_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    38→        behavior_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    39→        score_tier VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'new',
    40→        last_updated TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    41→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    42→      )
    43→    `);
    44→
    45→    // TrustScore components - individual score factors
    46→    await client.query(`
    47→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trust_score_components (
    48→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    49→        company_id INTEGER REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    50→        component_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    51→        source_type VARCHAR(50),
    52→        source_id INTEGER,
    53→        points INTEGER NOT NULL,
    54→        max_points INTEGER NOT NULL,
    55→        weight DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 1.0,
    56→        decay_rate DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0.98,
    57→        metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
    58→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    59→        expires_at TIMESTAMP
    60→      )
    61→    `);
    62→
    63→    // TrustScore history
    64→    await client.query(`
    65→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trust_score_history (
    66→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    67→        company_id INTEGER REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    68→        previous_score INTEGER,
    69→        new_score INTEGER,
    70→        change_amount INTEGER,
    71→        change_reason VARCHAR(255),
    72→        component_type VARCHAR(50),
    73→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    74→      )
    75→    `);
    76→
    77→    // Job analytics - track job performance
    78→    await client.query(`
    79→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_analytics (
    80→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    81→        job_id INTEGER REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    82→        views INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    83→        applications INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    84→        interviews_scheduled INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    85→        offers_made INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    86→        offers_accepted INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    87→        last_view_at TIMESTAMP,
    88→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    89→        updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    90→      )
    91→    `);
    92→
    93→    // Candidate feedback on companies
    94→    await client.query(`
    95→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS candidate_feedback (
    96→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    97→        company_id INTEGER REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    98→        candidate_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    99→        job_id INTEGER REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
   100→        interview_id INTEGER REFERENCES interviews(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
   101→        rating INTEGER CHECK (rating >= 1 AND rating <= 5),
   102→        communication_rating INTEGER CHECK (communication_rating >= 1 AND communication_rating <= 5),
   103→        process_rating INTEGER CHECK (process_rating >= 1 AND process_rating <= 5),
   104→        feedback_text TEXT,
   105→        is_anonymous BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
   106→        feedback_type VARCHAR(50),
   107→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
   108→      )
   109→    `);
   110→
   111→    // Scheduled interviews (recruiter-side)
   112→    await client.query(`
   113→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scheduled_interviews (
   114→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   115→        company_id INTEGER REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   116→        job_id INTEGER REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   117→        candidate_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   118→        recruiter_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
   119→        scheduled_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
   120→        duration_minutes INTEGER DEFAULT 60,
   121→        interview_type VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'video',
   122→        meeting_link TEXT,
   123→        notes TEXT,
   124→        status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'scheduled',
   125→        outcome VARCHAR(50),
   126→        feedback JSONB,
   127→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
   128→        updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
   129→      )
   130→    `);
   131→
   132→    // Job applications
   133→    await client.query(`
   134→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_applications (
   135→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   136→        job_id INTEGER REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   137→        candidate_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   138→        company_id INTEGER REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   139→        status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'applied',
   140→        resume_url TEXT,
   141→        cover_letter TEXT,
   142→        omniscore_at_apply INTEGER,
   143→        recruiter_notes TEXT,
   144→        applied_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
   145→        updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
   146→        UNIQUE(job_id, candidate_id)
   147→      )
   148→    `);
   149→
   150→    // Add company_id to jobs table if not exists
   151→    await client.query(`
   152→      ALTER TABLE jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS company_id INTEGER REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
   153→    `);
   154→
   155→    // Add recruiter role fields to users
   156→    await client.query(`
   157→      ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS company_id INTEGER REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
   158→    `);
   159→
   160→    // Create indexes
   161→    await client.query(`
   162→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_trust_score_company ON trust_scores(company_id);
   163→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_trust_components_company ON trust_score_components(company_id);
   164→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_job_analytics_job ON job_analytics(job_id);
   165→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_candidate_feedback_company ON candidate_feedback(company_id);
   166→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_scheduled_interviews_company ON scheduled_interviews(company_id);
   167→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_scheduled_interviews_date ON scheduled_interviews(scheduled_at);
   168→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_job_applications_job ON job_applications(job_id);
   169→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_job_applications_candidate ON job_applications(candidate_id);
   170→    `);
   171→
   172→    console.log('TrustScore tables created successfully');
   173→  }
   174→};

1→// OmniScore Migration - Candidate Credit Score System
     2→module.exports = {
     3→  name: 'add_omniscore_tables',
     4→  up: async (client) => {
     5→    // OmniScore main table - stores current score and history
     6→    await client.query(`
     7→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS omni_scores (
     8→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
     9→        user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE UNIQUE,
    10→        total_score INTEGER DEFAULT 300,
    11→        interview_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    12→        technical_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    13→        resume_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    14→        behavior_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    15→        score_tier VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'new',
    16→        last_updated TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    17→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    18→      )
    19→    `);
    20→
    21→    // Score components - individual score factors with time decay
    22→    await client.query(`
    23→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS score_components (
    24→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    25→        user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    26→        component_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    27→        source_type VARCHAR(50),
    28→        source_id INTEGER,
    29→        points INTEGER NOT NULL,
    30→        max_points INTEGER NOT NULL,
    31→        weight DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 1.0,
    32→        decay_rate DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0.95,
    33→        metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
    34→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    35→        expires_at TIMESTAMP
    36→      )
    37→    `);
    38→
    39→    // Score history - track score changes over time
    40→    await client.query(`
    41→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS score_history (
    42→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    43→        user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    44→        previous_score INTEGER,
    45→        new_score INTEGER,
    46→        change_amount INTEGER,
    47→        change_reason VARCHAR(255),
    48→        component_type VARCHAR(50),
    49→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    50→      )
    51→    `);
    52→
    53→    // Role-specific scores
    54→    await client.query(`
    55→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS role_scores (
    56→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    57→        user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    58→        role_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    59→        score INTEGER DEFAULT 300,
    60→        interview_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    61→        last_updated TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    62→        UNIQUE(user_id, role_name)
    63→      )
    64→    `);
    65→
    66→    // Create indexes for performance
    67→    await client.query(`
    68→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_score_components_user ON score_components(user_id);
    69→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_score_history_user ON score_history(user_id);
    70→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_role_scores_user ON role_scores(user_id);
    71→    `);
    72→
    73→    console.log('OmniScore tables created successfully');
    74→  }
    75→};
    76→

1→module.exports = {
     2→  name: '014_onboarding_system',
     3→  async up(client) {
     4→    // Offer letters table
     5→    await client.query(`
     6→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS offers (
     7→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
     8→        candidate_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
     9→        job_id INTEGER REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    10→        recruiter_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    11→        title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    12→        company_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    13→        salary DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    14→        start_date DATE,
    15→        benefits TEXT,
    16→        template_data JSONB,
    17→        status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'draft',
    18→        sent_at TIMESTAMP,
    19→        viewed_at TIMESTAMP,
    20→        accepted_at TIMESTAMP,
    21→        declined_at TIMESTAMP,
    22→        decline_reason TEXT,
    23→        signature_url TEXT,
    24→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    25→        updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    26→      )
    27→    `);
    28→
    29→    // Onboarding checklists
    30→    await client.query(`
    31→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS onboarding_checklists (
    32→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    33→        offer_id INTEGER REFERENCES offers(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    34→        candidate_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    35→        title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    36→        description TEXT,
    37→        items JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    38→        completed_items JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    39→        status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'pending',
    40→        due_date DATE,
    41→        completed_at TIMESTAMP,
    42→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    43→        updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    44→      )
    45→    `);
    46→
    47→    // Document collection for onboarding
    48→    await client.query(`
    49→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS onboarding_documents (
    50→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    51→        checklist_id INTEGER REFERENCES onboarding_checklists(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    52→        candidate_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    53→        document_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    54→        document_url TEXT,
    55→        status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'pending',
    56→        uploaded_at TIMESTAMP,
    57→        verified_at TIMESTAMP,
    58→        verified_by INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    59→        notes TEXT,
    60→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    61→      )
    62→    `);
    63→
    64→    // Post-hire feedback tracking
    65→    await client.query(`
    66→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS post_hire_feedback (
    67→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    68→        employee_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    69→        manager_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    70→        feedback_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    71→        day_mark INTEGER,
    72→        questions JSONB,
    73→        responses JSONB,
    74→        satisfaction_score INTEGER,
    75→        would_recommend BOOLEAN,
    76→        comments TEXT,
    77→        ai_analysis JSONB,
    78→        status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'pending',
    79→        sent_at TIMESTAMP,
    80→        completed_at TIMESTAMP,
    81→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    82→      )
    83→    `);
    84→
    85→    // Company policies for AI Q&A
    86→    await client.query(`
    87→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS company_policies (
    88→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    89→        company_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    90→        category VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    91→        title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    92→        content TEXT NOT NULL,
    93→        embeddings vector(1536),
    94→        effective_date DATE,
    95→        version INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
    96→        is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
    97→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    98→        updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    99→      )
   100→    `);
   101→
   102→    // Onboarding AI chat sessions
   103→    await client.query(`
   104→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS onboarding_chats (
   105→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   106→        candidate_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   107→        checklist_id INTEGER REFERENCES onboarding_checklists(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
   108→        messages JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
   109→        session_started TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
   110→        last_activity TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
   111→        is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true
   112→      )
   113→    `);
   114→
   115→    // Offer letter templates
   116→    await client.query(`
   117→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS offer_templates (
   118→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   119→        company_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   120→        name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
   121→        template_html TEXT NOT NULL,
   122→        variables JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
   123→        is_default BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
   124→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
   125→        updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
   126→      )
   127→    `);
   128→
   129→    // Indexes for performance
   130→    await client.query(`
   131→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_offers_candidate ON offers(candidate_id);
   132→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_offers_status ON offers(status);
   133→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_onboarding_checklists_candidate ON onboarding_checklists(candidate_id);
   134→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_post_hire_feedback_employee ON post_hire_feedback(employee_id);
   135→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_post_hire_feedback_day_mark ON post_hire_feedback(day_mark);
   136→      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_company_policies_company ON company_policies(company_id);
   137→    `);
   138→
   139→    console.log('Onboarding system tables created successfully');
   140→  }
   141→};

1→module.exports = {
     2→  name: '027_multi_country_support',
     3→  async up(client) {
     4→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     5→    // MULTI-COUNTRY ARCHITECTURE
     6→    // Adds country_code to key tables, country configuration,
     7→    // and country-specific onboarding document definitions.
     8→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     9→
    10→    // 1. Country configurations table — master reference for supported countries
    11→    await client.query(`
    12→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS country_configs (
    13→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    14→        country_code VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    15→        country_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    16→        currency_code VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
    17→        currency_symbol VARCHAR(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '$',
    18→        date_format VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'MM/DD/YYYY',
    19→        default_pay_frequency VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'bi-weekly',
    20→        timezone VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'America/New_York',
    21→        tax_system VARCHAR(50),
    22→        employment_model VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'at-will',
    23→        notice_period_days INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    24→        statutory_deductions JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    25→        required_onboarding_docs JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    26→        legal_requirements JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
    27→        is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
    28→        created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    29→        updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    30→      )
    31→    `);
    32→
    33→    // 2. Seed supported countries
    34→    await client.query(`
    35→      INSERT INTO country_configs (country_code, country_name, currency_code, currency_symbol, date_format, default_pay_frequency, timezone, tax_system, employment_model, notice_period_days, statutory_deductions, required_onboarding_docs, legal_requirements) VALUES
    36→      ('US', 'United States', 'USD', '$', 'MM/DD/YYYY', 'bi-weekly', 'America/New_York', 'federal_state', 'at-will', 0,
    37→        '["federal_income_tax","state_income_tax","social_security","medicare"]'::jsonb,
    38→        '["i9","w4","direct_deposit","emergency_contact","employee_handbook"]'::jsonb,
    39→        '{"i9_required":true,"w4_required":true,"fica_required":true,"state_tax_varies":true,"at_will_employment":true}'::jsonb),
    40→
    41→      ('IN', 'India', 'INR', '₹', 'DD/MM/YYYY', 'monthly', 'Asia/Kolkata', 'income_tax_slabs', 'contract', 30,
    42→        '["income_tax","provident_fund","esi","professional_tax"]'::jsonb,
    43→        '["pan_card","aadhaar","pf_form11","pf_nomination","esi_form","gratuity_nomination","employee_handbook"]'::jsonb,
    44→        '{"pan_required":true,"aadhaar_required":true,"pf_mandatory":true,"esi_threshold":21000,"gratuity_after_5_years":true,"notice_period_standard":30}'::jsonb),
    45→
    46→      ('GB', 'United Kingdom', 'GBP', '£', 'DD/MM/YYYY', 'monthly', 'Europe/London', 'paye', 'contract', 30,
    47→        '["income_tax","national_insurance","student_loan"]'::jsonb,
    48→        '["right_to_work","p45_or_starter","national_insurance","employee_handbook"]'::jsonb,
    49→        '{"right_to_work_required":true,"ni_required":true,"paye_system":true,"minimum_notice_1week_per_year":true,"statutory_sick_pay":true}'::jsonb),
    50→
    51→      ('CA', 'Canada', 'CAD', 'C$', 'YYYY-MM-DD', 'bi-weekly', 'America/Toronto', 'federal_provincial', 'contract', 14,
    52→        '["federal_income_tax","provincial_income_tax","cpp","ei"]'::jsonb,
    53→        '["td1_federal","td1_provincial","sin_collection","employee_handbook"]'::jsonb,
    54→        '{"td1_required":true,"sin_required":true,"cpp_mandatory":true,"ei_mandatory":true,"minimum_notice_varies_by_province":true}'::jsonb),
    55→
    56→      ('DE', 'Germany', 'EUR', '€', 'DD.MM.YYYY', 'monthly', 'Europe/Berlin', 'income_tax_class', 'contract', 28,
    57→        '["income_tax","solidarity_surcharge","church_tax","health_insurance","pension","unemployment"]'::jsonb,
    58→        '["gdpr_consent","tax_id","social_insurance","work_permit","employee_handbook"]'::jsonb,
    59→        '{"gdpr_required":true,"work_permit_non_eu":true,"tax_class_system":true,"mandatory_health_insurance":true,"minimum_28_vacation_days":true}'::jsonb),
    60→
    61→      ('FR', 'France', 'EUR', '€', 'DD/MM/YYYY', 'monthly', 'Europe/Paris', 'income_tax_progressive', 'contract', 30,
    62→        '["income_tax","social_contributions","csg_crds"]'::jsonb,
    63→        '["gdpr_consent","carte_vitale","work_permit","employee_handbook"]'::jsonb,
    64→        '{"gdpr_required":true,"35hr_work_week":true,"minimum_5_weeks_vacation":true,"mandatory_profit_sharing_50plus":true}'::jsonb),
    65→
    66→      ('AU', 'Australia', 'AUD', 'A$', 'DD/MM/YYYY', 'monthly', 'Australia/Sydney', 'payg', 'contract', 14,
    67→        '["payg_withholding","superannuation","medicare_levy"]'::jsonb,
    68→        '["tfn_declaration","super_choice","fair_work_info","employee_handbook"]'::jsonb,
    69→        '{"tfn_required":true,"superannuation_11_5_percent":true,"fair_work_act":true,"minimum_4_weeks_leave":true}'::jsonb),
    70→
    71→      ('SG', 'Singapore', 'SGD', 'S$', 'DD/MM/YYYY', 'monthly', 'Asia/Singapore', 'progressive', 'contract', 30,
    72→        '["income_tax","cpf_employee","cpf_employer"]'::jsonb,
    73→        '["nric_or_fin","cpf_submission","work_pass","employee_handbook"]'::jsonb,
    74→        '{"cpf_mandatory":true,"work_pass_required_foreigners":true,"no_minimum_wage":true,"14_days_annual_leave":true}'::jsonb)
    75→
    76→      ON CONFLICT (country_code) DO NOTHING
    77→    `);
    78→
    79→    // 3. Add country_code to companies (with operating_countries for multi-country ops)
    80→    await client.query(`

    82→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS primary_country VARCHAR(2) DEFAULT 'US',
    83→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS operating_countries JSONB DEFAULT '["US"]'

    85→

    87→    await client.query(`

    94→
    95→    // 5. Add country_code to offers
    96→    await client.query(`
    97→      ALTER TABLE offers
    98→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS country_code VARCHAR(2) DEFAULT 'US',

   100→    `);
   101→
   102→    // 6. Add country_code to employees
   103→    await client.query(`

   105→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS country_code VARCHAR(2) DEFAULT 'US',
   106→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS currency_code VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'USD'
   107→    `);
   108→
   109→    // 7. Add country_code to candidate_onboarding_data
   110→    await client.query(`
   111→      ALTER TABLE candidate_onboarding_data
   112→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS country_code VARCHAR(2) DEFAULT 'US',
   113→      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS country_specific_data JSONB DEFAULT '{}'
   114→    `);
   115→
   116→    // 8. Country-specific onboarding document types reference
   117→    await client.query(`
   118→      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS country_document_types (
   119→        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   120→        country_code VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL,
   121→        document_key VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,

   123→        description TEXT,

   130→        UNIQUE(country_code, document_key)
   131→      )
   132→    `);
   133→
   134→    // 9. Seed document types for each country
   135→    await client.query(`
   136→      INSERT INTO country_document_types (country_code, document_key, document_name, description, is_required, government_form_id, wizard_step) VALUES
   137→      -- USA
   138→      ('US', 'i9', 'Form I-9 Employment Eligibility', 'USCIS Form I-9 — verifies identity and work authorization', true, 'USCIS I-9 (01/20/2025)', 1),
   139→      ('US', 'w4', 'Form W-4 Tax Withholding', 'IRS Form W-4 — federal tax withholding certificate', true, 'IRS W-4 (2025)', 2),
   140→      ('US', 'state_tax', 'State Tax Withholding', 'State-specific tax withholding form (if applicable)', false, NULL, 2),
   141→      ('US', 'direct_deposit', 'Direct Deposit Authorization', 'Banking info for payroll', true, NULL, 3),
   142→      ('US', 'emergency_contact', 'Emergency Contact', 'Emergency contact information', true, NULL, 3),
   143→      ('US', 'employee_handbook', 'Employee Handbook Acknowledgment', 'Company policies and handbook', true, NULL, 4),
   144→
